memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &Credentials, Settings const &Settings, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: UserProfile

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &Credentials, Settings const &Settings, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: UserProfile

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserProfile

briefdescription.para: Get user's own profile information. If it doesn't exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPublicUserProfileInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetPublicUserProfileInfo

briefdescription.para: Get other user's public profile information. If it doesn't exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the user.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsPublicUserProfileInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserIds, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsPublicUserProfileInfo > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BatchGetPublicUserProfileInfos

briefdescription.para: Batch get multiple user public profile information.

parameterdescription.para: Multiple user ids, separated by comma.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

xrefdescription.para: This method will be removed in the future, so please use BulkGetPublicUserProfileInfos(const TArray<FString>& UserIds , const THandler<TArray<FAccelByteModelsPublicUserProfileInfo>>& OnSuccess , FErrorHandler const& OnError)

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &UserIds, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsPublicUserProfileInfo > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkGetPublicUserProfileInfos

briefdescription.para: Bulk get multiple user public profile information.

parameterdescription.para: Multiple user ids.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &UserIds, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPublicUserProfileInfoV2 > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkGetPublicUserProfileInfosV2

briefdescription.para: Bulk get multiple user public profile information.

parameterdescription.para: Multiple user ids.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FJsonObject > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetCustomAttributes

briefdescription.para: Get user's own custom attribute profile information. If it doesn't exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FJsonObject.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FJsonObject > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetPublicCustomAttributes

briefdescription.para: Get user's own custom attribute profile information. If it doesn't exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the user.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FJsonObject.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsUserProfileUpdateRequest const &ProfileUpdateRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateUserProfile

briefdescription.para: Update user's current profile information. If it doesn't exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: Request object.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FJsonObject const &CustomAttributesUpdateRequest, THandler< FJsonObject > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateCustomAttributes

briefdescription.para: Update user's current custom attributes profile information. If it doesn't exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: Request object which consists custom attributes profile information.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FJsonObject.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsUserProfileCreateRequest const &ProfileCreateRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreateUserProfile

briefdescription.para: Create complete player profile. If it already exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: Request object.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PublicId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPublicUserProfileInfo > const &OnSuccess, FCustomErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserProfilePublicInfoByPublicId

briefdescription.para: Get User Profile Public Info By PublicId.

parameterdescription.para: The Public Id of user used to get user profile
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FUserProfilePublicInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FAccelByteModelsUserProfileCreateRequest const &ProfileCreateRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreateUserProfile

briefdescription.para: Create complete player profile. If it already exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the user.
Request object.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: UpdateUserProfile

briefdescription.para: Update user's current profile information. If it doesn't exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the user.
Request object.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserProfile

briefdescription.para: Get user's own profile information. If it doesn't exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the user.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Folder, EAccelByteFileType FileType, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserProfileUploadURLResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GenerateUploadURL

briefdescription.para: Generate an upload URL. It's valid for 10 minutes..

parameterdescription.para: The name of folder where the file will be uploaded, must be between 1-256 characters, all characters allowed no whitespace.
One of the these types: jpeg, jpg, png, bmp, gif, mp3, bin, webp.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, EAccelByteFileType FileType, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserProfileUploadURLResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteUploadCategory Category=EAccelByteUploadCategory::DEFAULT)
memberdef.name: GenerateUploadURLForUserContent

briefdescription.para: Generate an upload URL for user content. It's valid for 10 minutes. There are 2 kinds of storage limitation per user : maximum file count and maximum file size.

parameterdescription.para: User's id, should follow UUID version 4 without hyphen.
One of the these types: jpeg, jpg, png, bmp, gif, mp3, bin, webp.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserProfileInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Upload category. Supported categories: default, reporting. Default value : default.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FJsonObjectWrapper > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetPrivateCustomAttributes

briefdescription.para: Get user's own private custom attribute profile information. If it doesn't exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FJsonObject.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FJsonObject const &PrivateCustomAttributesUpdateRequest, THandler< FJsonObjectWrapper > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdatePrivateCustomAttributes

briefdescription.para: Update user's own private custom attributes profile information. If it doesn't exist, that will be an error.

parameterdescription.para: Request object which consists private custom attributes profile information.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FJsonObject.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: UserProfile

memberdef.name: UserProfile

briefdescription.para: API to create, update, and get user's profile.
